summary: Responsive scan UI with copyable scanner logs, sequential tiered scanning, and bracketed menu bar free-space labels.
introduced: Scan panel shows the scanner log file path and tail command to copy into Terminal instead of streaming verbose output in the app
changed: Menu bar free-space readouts show remaining space in brackets, for example HD (122GB)
Scan progress updates are coalesced so the app stays responsive during long scans
Tiered volume scans run folders sequentially with lighter progress payloads
removed: In-app current path and directory queue panels during scans — follow the scanner log in Terminal instead
